metadata.name: yo-fluq
metadata.summary: LINQ port to Python and some smaller useful functional things

modules.name: yo_fluq_ds._queryable_helpers.original_asq_ordering
documentation: Classes which support the Queryable interface.

classes.name: yo_fluq_ds._queryable_helpers.original_asq_ordering.Orderer

methods.name: yo_fluq_ds._queryable_helpers.original_asq_ordering.Orderer.__init__
documentation:
Create an OrderedIterable.

Args:
    iterable: The iterable sequence to be ordered.
    order: +1 for ascending, -1 for descending.
    func: The function to select the sorting key.

methods.name: yo_fluq_ds._queryable_helpers.original_asq_ordering.Orderer.__iter__
documentation:
Support for the iterator protocol.

Returns:
    An iterator object over the sorted elements.

A Queryable representing an ordered iterable.

The sorting implemented by this class is an incremental partial sort so
you don't pay for sorting results which are never enumerated.
